Description: Required MP-related services must be running.
Recommendation: Start stopped required services and review Windows Event Logs, MPControl.log and IIS status.

Description: MP IIS application pools should be present and started.
Recommendation: Validate IIS, Management Point installation, app pools and related IIS event logs.

Description: MPControl.log should not contain recent error indicators.
Recommendation: Review MPControl.log and correlate errors with IIS, certificates, bindings and client communication mode.

Description: The MPList endpoint should respond according to client communication mode.
Recommendation: Validate HTTP/HTTPS bindings, firewall, DNS and certificate trust.
